name: Use Cases: Validate all tool modules (manual)

action.message:
Please validate all use case tool modules in use_cases/.

For each .py file in use_cases/ (excluding common/ subdirectory):
1. Call load_tools(name) and validate_tools(module)
2. Report the result: PASS (empty list) or FAIL (list of missing names)
3. For any FAIL, show exactly which names are missing and suggest fixes

Then summarise:
- Total use cases found
- Total passing
- Total failing
- Any use cases listed in README.md that don't have a corresponding .py file

Use the code: from use_cases.common.base_tools import load_tools, validate_tools
